productDisplayName: Baggit Women Auxi Hoor Red Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 20 cm Crafted from velvet with a two-fold open style Fabric bow design on the upper with press button closures One main compartment with thirteen card holders, four insert pockets and an id card holder Two zippered pockets at the back Printed branding at the back Care Wipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
